edge_hypothesis: MACD histogram zero-line crosses on 4h timeframe are inherently low-frequency signals (~2-4 per week on ETH). The advisory identifies fee drag as the #1 profitability killer (62% of gross eaten by fees on ETH/4h). By combining MACD's natural low signal frequency with extreme reward-to-risk ratios (4:1 to 5:1), each winning trade must offset 3-5 losers — but the math works when win rate exceeds 25%. This is a fundamentally different approach from the pipeline's RSI/EMA combos which generate 220+ trades with PF~0.92. Fewer, larger wins > many small wins when fees are fixed per trade. The EMA_50 structural filter ensures we only take MACD signals in the direction of the intermediate trend, avoiding counter-trend histogram flips that typically fail.
regime_assumption: Strongest in established trending regimes (ADX > 25). MACD histogram zero-crosses in trending markets mark momentum re-acceleration after pullbacks, not random oscillation. Invalidates in ranging markets (ADX < 15) where MACD oscillates around zero producing whipsaw signals. Transitional regimes (ADX 15-25) are acceptable for the moderate variant but excluded from the aggressive variant.

variants.name: macd_momentum_standard
variants.description: Standard MACD zero-cross with EMA_50 context and 3:1 R:R. Baseline variant to establish whether MACD produces any edge on ETH/4h. ADX>20 gate filters ranging whipsaws. This is the control variant.
entry_long: Require MACDh_12_26_9 crosses above zero on bar close (momentum turns positive).
Require close > EMA_50 (intermediate trend is up).
entry_short: Require MACDh_12_26_9 crosses below zero on bar close (momentum turns negative).
Require close < EMA_50 (intermediate trend is down).
filters: Backtester executable indicators: EMA, SMA, RSI, ATR, MACD, Bollinger Bands, Stochastic, ADX, CCI, Williams %R, OBV, VWAP, Ichimoku, Supertrend, Donchian Channels.
exit_rules: Exit on MACDh_12_26_9 crossing back through zero (momentum reversal).
Exit on close crossing EMA_50 against trade direction (structural trend break).
Exit on max bars in trade threshold (20 bars = ~3.3 days on 4h).
Hypothesis failure mode guard: MACD whipsaw in low-ADX consolidation
Hypothesis failure mode guard: Gap-driven histogram flip with no follow-through
risk_rules: Risk note: risk per trade target is 1%.
Stop loss at 2.0x ATR_14 from entry (wider stop for 4h timeframe noise).
Take profit at 6.0x ATR_14 from entry (3:1 R:R — fee-drag countermeasure).
Fee optimization: fewer trades with larger winners to overcome 62% fee drag ratio.

components.notes: ATR_14 for stop/TP sizing + ADX_14 for regime gate

variants.name: macd_momentum_aggressive
variants.description: High-ADX gated MACD with extreme 4:1 R:R. Only enters when ADX>30 confirms strong trend. Hypothesis: the highest-conviction MACD signals occur in already-trending markets where momentum acceleration has the best follow-through. Fewer trades but targeting quality over quantity.
entry_long: Require MACDh_12_26_9 crosses above zero on bar close.
Require ADX_14 > 30 (strong trend only — high conviction).
entry_short: Require MACDh_12_26_9 crosses below zero on bar close.
Require ADX_14 > 30 (strong trend only — high conviction).
filters: Backtester executable indicators: EMA, SMA, RSI, ATR, MACD, Bollinger Bands, Stochastic, ADX, CCI, Williams %R, OBV, VWAP, Ichimoku, Supertrend, Donchian Channels.
exit_rules: Exit on MACDh_12_26_9 crossing back through zero.
Exit on close crossing EMA_50 against trade direction.
Exit on max bars in trade threshold (25 bars).
Hypothesis failure mode guard: ADX declining from 30+ during trade (trend weakening)
Hypothesis failure mode guard: MACD signal at trend exhaustion point
risk_rules: Risk note: risk per trade target is 1%.
Stop loss at 2.5x ATR_14 from entry (wider for strong-trend volatility).
Take profit at 10.0x ATR_14 from entry (4:1 R:R — maximum fee-drag offset).
High-conviction entries: wider stops prevent premature shakeout in trending markets.

components.notes: ATR_14 for wide stop/TP + ADX_14 for high-conviction gate

variants.name: macd_momentum_extended_hold
variants.description: MACD zero-cross with extended hold period (35 bars = ~6 days on 4h). Hypothesis: the advisory's PF=1.054 trending result on ETH/4h suggests trends persist for days. By allowing trades to run longer, we capture more of the trend move. Moderate ADX gate (>22) with 5:1 R:R. Targets the 'let winners run' principle from the exit_change insight.
entry_long: Require MACDh_12_26_9 crosses above zero on bar close.
entry_short: Require MACDh_12_26_9 crosses below zero on bar close.
filters: Backtester executable indicators: EMA, SMA, RSI, ATR, MACD, Bollinger Bands, Stochastic, ADX, CCI, Williams %R, OBV, VWAP, Ichimoku, Supertrend, Donchian Channels.
exit_rules: Exit on MACDh_12_26_9 crossing back through zero.
Exit on close crossing EMA_50 against trade direction.
Exit on max bars in trade threshold (35 bars = ~6 days on 4h).
Hypothesis failure mode guard: Trend exhaustion during extended hold
Hypothesis failure mode guard: Weekend gap through stop level
risk_rules: Risk note: risk per trade target is 1%.
Stop loss at 2.0x ATR_14 from entry.
Take profit at 10.0x ATR_14 from entry (5:1 R:R — maximum trend capture).
Extended hold + wide TP: designed to capture multi-day trend moves per exit_change insight.

components.notes: MACDh_12_26_9 zero-cross with extended hold thesis
ATR_14 for stop/TP + ADX_14 moderate gate
